name: AI Fantasy
short_description: A text adventure with everything pre-generated and illustrated by AI. 100 unique stories, over 10,000 events, several thousand items, narrated story, AI-generated music, and progression between runs.
detailed_description:
AI Fantasy: A Dark Roguelite RPG Odyssey

Welcome to “AI Fantasy,” a roguelite RPG where artificial intelligence shapes every twist and turn of your adventure.

🔥 Key Features:

  • 📜 100 Quests: Experience a variety of AI-generated stories. Some are epic, some tragic, some absurd, and some downright bizarre. Each one is unique and creative.

  • ⚔️ 10,000+ Events: Will you help the people and adventure with honor, or will you kill and rob everything in your path?

  • 🎨 AI-Generated Illustrations: Every event and quest is brought to life with high-resolution AI art.

  • 📈 Progression Between Runs: Climb through 54 levels, gaining XP after each run. No grinding required, as the XP needed to level up remains constant.

  • 🎶 AI-Generated Music: Let AI-composed music set the mood as you journey through eerie dungeons and haunted forests.

  • 🌍 Diverse Realms: Explore 12 unique biomes, each with its own set of challenges and rewards.

  • 💪 Level Up: Enhance your attributes and find legendary items to become an unstoppable force.

  • 🧙‍♂️ Multiple Ways to Play: Choose to be a powerful mage, a quick acrobat, or a master with words. Each build offers a different gameplay experience.

  • 🎒 Manage Your Inventory: Will you risk adventuring with bad items to sell them later, or will you get rid of them to travel safely?

  • ⚡ Quick Gameplay: Everything is pre-generated, so you won’t have to wait for an AI to generate things in real time.

In “AI Fantasy,” every moment is a new discovery. Jump in and see what awaits!
